'''Sirlul''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] from the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. She was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] navy who served as a bridge officer on the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]. She was present during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]] and negotiated the terms of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Monarch (Star Destroyer)|''Monarch'''s]] surrender.<ref name="Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>
